text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
114 
MDCR_TOTAL_SPEND 
LABEL: 
Medicare Payment Amount — Total 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payment amount for all Medicare fee-for-service (FFS) claims, Part 
D events (PDEs), and Medicare Advantage capitated payments for the beneficiary during the year. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Claims files and MARx file (derived) 
VALUES: 
$ 
COMMENT: 
CCW calculates this variable as the sum of all
